source: Creator Monetize — Clairvoyance Cartography, GSB, Client Avatar, Research

gap_framework.concept: The Gap — current state vs desired state, your product is the bridge
gap_framework.principle: People don't buy when they understand, they buy when they feel understood

seven_tenets.description: 7 criteria for market selection. Hierarchy: Market > Offer > Persuasion Skills

tenets.name: Pain
tenets.description: More pain = higher price, faster purchase

tenets.name: Purchasing Power
tenets.description: Market must afford what you sell

tenets.name: Know Them Intimately
tenets.description: Were you previously your ideal client?

specificity_principle.concept: More specific = higher price + more customers

pricing_ladder.product: Time Management For Outbound B2B Sales
Time Management For Outbound B2B Power Tools & Gardening Sales Reps

online_manual.name: Online Manual Research
online_manual.description: Primary form; deep dive into niche lay of the land

questionnaire_calls.name: Social Media Questionnaire / Free Discovery Calls
questionnaire_calls.description: Poll audience or offer free 15-min consults; ask questions for advice

ai_research.name: ChatGPT Research
ai_research.description: Good start but NOT sufficient alone; must supplement with human research

gsb_analysis.name: Gold Silver Bronze Research Process

gold.purpose: What wins — analyze what makes these top performers

bronze.purpose: What fails — identify what to avoid

process: Find Gold/Silver/Bronze content in your niche

ideal_client_18_questions: Where does your dream buyer hang out?
Where does your dream buyer get their information?
What are their biggest frustrations and challenges?
What are their biggest hopes, dreams and desires?
What vernacular and language do they use?
What does a day in the life of your dream buyer look like?
What is the specific quantifiable end result (QER) you help them achieve?
What's the primary motivation for wanting to achieve the end result?
What is the majority doing to attempt to reach their desired situation?
What is it costing them to try to reach QER on their own?
What aspects of their life affect how you market your offer?
What happened in the past that led them to this point?
What is their family and relationship status?
What are the things they do NOT want to do?
What is the 'final straw' that makes them pull the trigger?

psychographics_positioning: Want to learn or be entertained
purchasing: Buy based on logic or emotion

market_research_aggregation.scoring: Rate each word/phrase out of 10 in importance
market_research_aggregation.output: Niche-specific glossary of exact phrases your market uses
